outcome_contract.why: The current CI setup is fragmented: validation is duplicated across ci.yml, reusable-app.yml, and per-app workflows. A Brikette-only fix created new duplication instead of reducing it. The operator wants the simplest possible model: one validation workflow, thin deploy workflows, merge-only staging and main.
outcome_contract.intended_outcome_statement: All apps share one validation workflow (ci.yml) on dev/PR and thin per-app deploy workflows on staging/main, with no validation duplication, no workflow_dispatch, and path-gated skip-if-unchanged semantics.

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: No product UI changes. Workflow/infra only.
Branch-to-workflow behavior defines the operator/agent interaction model. Current model is fragmented across 10+ workflow files with inconsistent trigger/deploy semantics.
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Multiple mental models needed to understand which workflow does what for which app.
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Simplify to two clear layers: ci.yml validates, per-app deploys.

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Deploy lanes rely on GitHub branch flow, secrets, SOPS decryption. workflow_dispatch creates additional privileged execution paths.
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Extra manual publish paths increase attack surface.
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Remove workflow_dispatch; keep branch-driven, PR-gated deploys only.

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: CI job logs are the primary visibility surface. Multiple workflows for the same app split visibility.
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Hard to determine which workflow ran for a given commit when 2-3 fire simultaneously.
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: One validation workflow + one deploy workflow per app = clear audit trail.

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: ci.yml runs turbo --affected for lint/typecheck/test. Per-app workflows duplicate this. Some app-specific validation (CMS sharding, prime firebase gate, reception firebase rules) exists only in per-app or reusable-app workflows.
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: App-specific validations may not be covered by turbo --affected. Must verify before removing.
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Decide whether app-specific gates move to ci.yml or remain in thin deploy workflows.

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Workflow triggers, path filters, merge-gate scopeWorkflowMap, and filter-config.ts define the release contracts.
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Contracts are spread across 10+ files. merge-gate is the critical coupling point.
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Consolidate; update merge-gate and filter-config atomically.

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Validation duplication doubles CI minutes for shared-package changes. reusable-app checkout retry logic suggests reliability issues.
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Duplicate validation wastes CI minutes and increases failure surface.
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Remove duplicate validation; keep checkout retries only where needed.

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Current branch scripts (ship-to-staging.sh, promote-to-main.sh) already enforce PR-based promotion.
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Workflow file changes are reversible via git revert. Merge-gate update must be atomic with workflow changes.
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Phase the rollout: update ci.yml + one app first, verify, then extend.

stage_payload.scope_summary: Replace the current patchwork of per-app validation+deploy workflows with a clean two-layer model: (1) `ci.yml` as the single validation workflow for all apps on dev/PR, running turbo lint/typecheck/test --affected; (2) thin per-app deploy-only workflows on staging/main that build and publish when relevant paths changed, with no lint/typecheck/test and no workflow_dispatch. This extends the Brikette-only CI simplification to every deployable app and fixes issues found in that implementation.
goals: Eliminate validation duplication: ci.yml owns all lint, typecheck, and test for every app on dev/PR.
Each deployable app gets a thin deploy workflow: detect changes, build, deploy. Triggered only on staging/main push.
"Nothing changed, nothing to do" for both validation (turbo --affected) and deploy (path-gated skip).
Remove workflow_dispatch from all app deploy workflows.
Staging and main are merge-only lanes — no manual publish entrypoint.
Add staging deploy capability to apps that lack it (caryina, reception, business-os).
non_goals: Redesign application code, static-export architecture, or Cloudflare Pages project structure.
Change the dev → staging → main branch promotion policy or scripts.
Add new testing frameworks or CI tooling beyond what already exists.
Modify non-app workflows (storybook, consent-analytics, lighthouse, cypress).
constraints: Tests run in CI only — no local Jest/e2e execution (existing policy).
Merge-gate.yml must continue to function — it watches specific workflow file IDs.
Ship-to-staging.sh and promote-to-main.sh scripts must remain compatible.
Per-app deploy secrets, environment variables, and health-check scripts must be preserved.
Static export workarounds (route-hide/restore) must be preserved for apps that need them.
assumptions: "Changed code" = what's in the push and its affected workspace/dependency surface.
Current Pages staging hosts are sufficient for MCP and Playwright agent tooling.
ci.yml's existing turbo --affected lint/typecheck/test is the correct foundation — no per-app validation is needed beyond it.
key_entry_points: `.github/workflows/ci.yml` — core validation: turbo lint/typecheck/test --affected on dev/PR pushes
`.github/workflows/reusable-app.yml` — 845-line shared app pipeline with validation, test sharding, deploy
`.github/workflows/brikette.yml` — standalone Brikette validation + deploy (recently rewritten, duplicates ci.yml)
`.github/workflows/merge-gate.yml` — PR merge gating: watches per-app workflow completion
`scripts/src/ci/filter-config.ts` — path filter configs for ci.yml, merge-gate, lighthouse

rehearsal_issues.Issues Found: [Scope gap resolved] auto-pr.yml dispatches brikette.yml by workflow_id — must be accounted for when removing workflow_dispatch
rehearsal_issues.Resolution Required: No — documented in resolved questions and risks

rehearsal_issues.Issues Found: [Scope gap] [Moderate]: CMS 4-shard test, prime firebase cost gate, and reception firebase rules test are not covered by turbo --affected. Must decide where these move.
